title: gonioanthela hilariana
side_effects: Gonioanthela hilariana can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems. Ingesting the plant can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap or oils can lead to skin irritation, rashes, and blisters in some individuals. Improper use of Gonioanthela hilariana can also trigger anaphylactic shock in severe cases, requiring immediate medical attention.
